creator: on@cs.ait.ac.th
text:
During the installation of 6.4 amd64

If I choose custom install, then select all, then deselect games and Xorg, the installation keeps on trying to install Xorg.

If I choose custom install and manually select everything except games abd Xorg, it will not try installing Xorg.

The problem repeated often enough to be sure it is not a mistake on my side.

How-To-Repeat: I am currently doing many reinstallations on a new machine, the problem appears each time I first select all then deselect Xorg.
